Task.title: Task
Task.description: An academic study task representing assignments, exams, homework, or revisions

title.description: Visual title of the academic study chore or assignment

subject.description: Class course name, e.g. Math, Chemistry, History

estimatedHours.description: Estimated time in hours to build or study

difficulty.description: Estimated mental fatigue severity on a 1-5 scale

suggestedDate.description: Alternate target start date generated by safety balancer engine

ownerId.description: The firebase UID of the student account owning this task

/tasks/{taskId}.description: Flat, user-owned collection of individual cognitive items
